codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit ef275044 and the current runtime seams. The public-id normalization logic was reconnected at the right post-hydration boundary, but the feature artifacts are incomplete: the worker session has no handoff file or transcript entry, so required scrutiny evidence is missing.

issues.description: No handoff JSON exists for completed worker session ac635f6f-96c0-4e74-80be-0b3346e911d4, so this review cannot verify the worker's declared commit, verification commands, or skill feedback as required by the scrutiny contract.
worker-transcripts.jsonl has no entry for worker session ac635f6f-96c0-4e74-80be-0b3346e911d4, so the transcript skeleton cannot be reviewed even though the scrutiny procedure requires it.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The review workflow depends on every completed feature producing both a handoff artifact and a worker-transcripts.jsonl entry, but this feature has neither despite being marked completed in features.json.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json lists completedWorkerSessionId ac635f6f-96c0-4e74-80be-0b3346e911d4 for milestone-c-reconnect-public-id-hydration-normalization, while searching handoffs/ and worker-transcripts.jsonl for that session id returned no matches.

summary: Code inspection of commit ef275044 suggests the implementation moved public-id stripping to the post-hydration boundary as intended, but scrutiny must fail because the required handoff and transcript evidence for worker session ac635f6f-96c0-4e74-80be-0b3346e911d4 is missing.
